NewESignConfig.Title: New ESign Config
NewESignConfig.ShortHelp: Create an eSignature configuration policy for each object authorization needed in their apps.
GridView.Title: Grid View
GridView.ShortHelp: Displays information in a table that contains one row for each item.
GridView.LongHelp: This view is useful when you want to see the most detailed information about items, and to sort or group them based on this information.
TileView.Title: Tile View
TileView.ShortHelp: Displays each item as a small tile.
TileView.LongHelp: This view is useful when you want to see minimal information about each items in a compact format.
Info.Title: Info
Info.ShortHelp: Provides the details of an eSignature cofiguration policy in the information panel
ChangeOwner.Title: Change Owner
ChangeOwner.ShortHelp: Opens the dialog box to search for and select the owner
NewRevision.Title: New Revision
NewRevision.ShortHelp: Creates a revision of the object.
Open.Title: Open
Open.ShortHelp: Open the selected eSignature cofiguration policy.
PreviewESign.Title: Preview ESign
PreviewESign.ShortHelp: Shows the preview of the eSignature configuration policy in the dialog box.
SetState.Title: Change maturity state
SetState.ShortHelp: Changes the maturity state of the object.
